title: Envoy Outlier Detection Ejection Events
app: Splunk Universal Forwarder, Splunk Connect for Syslog, or HTTP Event Collector; `props.conf`/`transforms.conf` for listed sourcetypes
spl:
index=proxy sourcetype="envoy:access"
| where match(response_flags, "UH") OR match(response_flags, "UF") OR match(_raw, "(?i)eject")
| stats count by upstream_host, cluster_name
| where count > 5
description: Ejections explain uneven load and surprise latency.
implementation: Tune outlier `consecutive_5xx`; confirm with periodic `/clusters` admin dumps (low volume).
visualization: Time series for rates and latency, top/dedup for hotspots, single-value alerts on health thresholds.
grandmaExplanation: We watch envoy outlier detection ejection events and catch issues early, before they turn into outages for the people who rely on the network.
knownFalsePositives: Edge cases: multi-vendor mixes and ad hoc feeds can include lab traffic and partial visibility that mimics issues until scopes are defined. Tuning tip: match this to «Envoy Outlier Detection Ejection Events» and exclude change windows, scans, and lab VLANs you already expect.
